title: Fading Summer Light
lyricSeed:
The days get shorter, so does us
But I'm still smiling, watch me glow
Sunset painting all your leaving
In colors I let go
Warm heartbreak on the boardwalk
A postcard fading slow
I loved you like a season
Now I let the summer close

chunks.text:
